<script lang="ts">
	import { cn, type WithElementRef, type WithoutChildren } from "$UTILS$.js";
	import type { HTMLTextareaAttributes } from "svelte/elements";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		value = $bindable(),
		class: className,
		"data-slot": dataSlot = "textarea",
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChildren<WithElementRef<HTMLTextareaAttributes>> = $props();
</script>

<textarea
	bind:this={ref}
	data-slot={dataSlot}
	class={cn(
		"border-input bg-background text-foreground ring-ring/24 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/72 focus-visible:border-ring aria-invalid:border-destructive/36 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:bg-input/32 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/24 min-h-17.5 rounded-lg border px-[calc(--spacing(3)-1px)] py-[calc(--spacing(1.5)-1px)] text-base shadow-xs/5 transition-shadow focus-visible:ring-[3px] disabled:opacity-64 aria-invalid:ring-3 max-sm:min-h-20.5 sm:text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground flex field-sizing-content min-h-16 w-full outline-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
		className
	)}
	bind:value
	{...restProps}
></textarea>
